props.name: targetSelector
props.description: CSS selector for elements that should trigger the cursor targeting effect

props.name: spinDuration
props.description: Duration in seconds for the cursor's spinning animation when not targeting

props.name: hideDefaultCursor
props.description: Whether to hide the default browser cursor when the component is active

props.name: hoverDuration
props.description: Duration in seconds for the transition when the cursor locks onto a target

props.name: parallaxOn
props.description: Enables a subtle parallax effect on the corners when moving over a target
